# createTestHttpServer()

```ts
function createTestHttpServer(createServer: () => McpServer): Promise<TestHttpServerSetup>;
```

Defined in: [testing/factory/http-server.factory.ts:38](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/testing/factory/http-server.factory.ts#L38)

Creates an Express HTTP server wired with MCP Streamable HTTP transport, session
management, health endpoint, and SSE backward compatibility for E2E tests.

## Parameters

| Parameter      | Type              | Description                                                  |
| -------------- | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `createServer` | () => `McpServer` | Factory function that returns a fresh McpServer per session. |

## Returns

`Promise`<[`TestHttpServerSetup`](../interfaces/TestHttpServerSetup.md)>

A promise resolving to the server, base URL, and active transport map.

## Remarks

The server listens on an OS-assigned port (`0`) and resolves with the base URL.
Callers must close `httpServer` after the test to free the port.
